posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to enhance your monday.com skills? Join our voluntary focus group!

monday-training1200×800 47.6 KB

As a participant, you will:

  • Receive free, online training sessions
  • Upgrade your Work OS abilities with coaching from a live instructor
  • Have the opportunity to shape our paid premium training service, set to launch soon.

All skill levels are welcome, whether you’re a seasoned user or a complete beginner. Our goal is to make our training accessible to as many people as possible.

Each session will last 30 minutes with an additional 30 minutes for feedback. Multiple class topics will be offered at different times, giving you the flexibility to choose a time that works for you. Class schedule will be announced after registration closes.

To register, please fill in our form: https://wkf.ms/3Hfk8cZ. Registration closes at noon on Monday, 8th May.

If you have any questions, please email me at lee@omnitas.com. Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to improve your skills and shape the future of monday.com training!
